name: figma-pp-mcp
description: This is the OpenAPI specification for the [Figma REST API](https://developers.figma.com/docs/rest-api/).

figma_access_token.title: FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN
figma_access_token.description: Sets FIGMA_ACCESS_TOKEN for the Figma MCP server.

figma_api_key.title: FIGMA_API_KEY
figma_api_key.description: Sets FIGMA_API_KEY for the Figma MCP server.

figma_api_token.title: FIGMA_API_TOKEN
figma_api_token.description: Sets FIGMA_API_TOKEN for the Figma MCP server.
